
;;;; String <=> List of Characters
  !(assertEqual 
    (stringToChars "xyzzy") 
    ('x' 'y' 'z' 'z' 'y'))

[

;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.STRING-TESTS.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.003 secs. (2.58 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqual 
    (stringToChars "xyzzy") 
    ('x' 'y' 'z' 'z' 'y'))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      ( ('x' 'y' 'z' 'z' 'y')) 
      ( ('x' 'y' 'z' 'z' 'y'))))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5762))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqual 
          (stringToChars "xyzzy") 
          ('x' 'y' 'z' 'z' 'y')) $_3542) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3918) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3542 $_3946) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3334) $_3946)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5762))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqual 
          (stringToChars "xyzzy") 
          ('x' 'y' 'z' 'z' 'y')) $_3542) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3918) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3542 $_3946) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3334) $_3946)))))
